nasb.text: They went out at noon, while Ben-hadad was drinking himself drunk in the temporary shelters with the thirty-two kings who helped him.

esv.text: And they went out at noon, while Ben-hadad was drinking himself drunk in the booths, he and the thirty-two kings who helped him.

cnv.text: 在正午，便．哈達與幫助他的三十二個王正在帳棚裡痛飲的時候，他們出發了。

ccb.text: 中午，便·哈达正跟盟军的三十二个王在营中狂饮的时候，亚哈率军出发了。
